exam_name: Databricks Certified Associate Developer for Apache Spark (Python)
certification_name: Databricks Certified Associate Developer for Apache Spark
id_requirements: Government-issued photo ID with full name. Name must match Webassessor registration exactly.
exam_rules: Closed-book. No notes or Databricks workspace access. Proctor monitors via webcam.
renewal_options: Certifications valid for 2 years. Renew by retaking the current version of the exam.
recommended_experience: 6+ months of hands-on experience performing the tasks outlined in the exam guide

retake_policy.notes: 14-day waiting period after failed attempt. Full exam fee required for retake.
